deep_dive.title: ST-DiffEye: Diffusion-based Continuous Gaze Generation via Joint Scanpath-Trajectory Modeling
deep_dive.abstract: We study the problem of human gaze modeling, which aims to generate the gaze patterns a viewer produces while observing a visual stimulus. Gaze is primarily captured through two modalities: continuous eye-tracking trajectories, which describe fine-grained motion dynamics, and discrete scanpaths, which describe high-level fixation structure. Because gaze varies substantially across viewers and trials, we treat this variability as a defining property rather than noise and model gaze as a stochastic generative process. Existing generative gaze models supervise on only one of these two representations in isolation. We hypothesize that trajectories and scanpaths describe gaze at complementary scales and are jointly informative during training, and test this hypothesis through ST-DiffEye, a joint trajectory-scanpath diffusion framework that couples both modalities by concatenating them as an additional raw input channel, requiring no architectural overhead beyond an input and output channel expansion. We further introduce a principled evaluation framework based on the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS), which generalizes any existing sequence similarity metric into a proper scoring rule that jointly assesses the accuracy and diversity of generated gaze. Experiments on task-driven visual search, covering both target-present and target-absent scenarios, and on free-viewing benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. These results, along with detailed ablations, confirm the benefit of joint modeling and the value of distribution-aware evaluation in capturing the intrinsic variability of human gaze. Project webpage: https://st-diffeye.github.io/
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: probabilistic gaze generation model using diffusion, joint scanpath-trajectory modeling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用扩散概率模型联合建模扫描路径与轨迹的注视生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用扩散概率模型联合建模扫描路径与轨迹的注视生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用扩散概率模型联合建模扫描路径与轨迹的注视生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a stochastic generative model for human gaze that jointly models continuous trajectories and discrete scanpaths using diffusion, capturing gaze variability across viewers.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有注视生成模型仅单独建模轨迹或扫描路径，忽略了二者的互补信息。本文提出ST-DiffEye，一种基于扩散的随机生成模型，同时建模连续眼动轨迹和离散扫描路径，将注视变异视为固有属性而非噪声。实验表明，联合建模能生成更逼真且多样化的注视模式，为注视概率建模提供了新方法，可应用于人机交互中的注视预测。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有注视生成模型仅单独建模轨迹或扫描路径，忽略了二者的互补信息。本文提出ST-DiffEye，一种基于扩散的随机生成模型，同时建模连续眼动轨迹和离散扫描路径，将注视变异视为固有属性而非噪声。实验表明，联合建模能生成更逼真且多样化的注视模式，为注视概率建模提供了新方法，可应用于人机交互中的注视预测。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 人类意图识别与人机交互（HCI）：基于多模态信号（特别是眼动追踪）的实时意图预测与交互范式研究。probabilistic modeling（概率建模）或 proactive interaction（前瞻性交互）, especially work that connects or combines: multimodal intent prediction eye movement; gaze-based human-computer interaction; eye tracking intention recognition; real-time intent recognition algorithms; real time human intent recognition using eye tracking data; gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response; computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements; probabilistic modeling of human gaze for proactive systems.

deep_dive.title: EPIC: A System Framework for Efficient Egocentric Perception on Embodied AR Glasses
deep_dive.abstract: Modern smart AR glasses are evolving into intelligent systems that support foundation model-based assistance through continuous perception of the user and surrounding environment. However, this perception-first design creates major bottlenecks. Continuously capturing, processing, and storing rich perceptual streams, especially high-resolution egocentric video, imposes substantial power and memory overhead, which is difficult to sustain on resource-constrained AR glasses. In this work, we propose EPIC, an efficient egocentric perception system for embodied intelligence on smart AR glasses. EPIC is an algorithm-hardware co-optimization framework that leverages gaze, pose, and inertial signals to infer user intent and retain only the most informative parts of high-resolution perceptual input, greatly reducing perception overhead. Our results show that EPIC reduces memory footprint by $27.5\times$ and energy consumption by $24.3\times$ on average compared with full video baseline solution, while preserving intelligent assistance accuracy on egocentric video understanding tasks, a key application scenario for embodied intelligence on smart glasses.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses gaze, pose, and inertial signals to infer user intent on AR glasses
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用注视、姿态和惯性信号推断AR眼镜上的用户意图
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用注视、姿态和惯性信号推断AR眼镜上的用户意图
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用注视、姿态和惯性信号推断AR眼镜上的用户意图
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes EPIC, an efficient egocentric perception framework for AR glasses that leverages gaze, pose, and inertial signals to infer user intent and retain only the most informative perceptual data, enabling real-time intent-aware interaction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有增强现实眼镜因持续捕捉高分辨率视频而导致功耗和内存瓶颈。本文提出EPIC框架，通过算法-硬件协同优化，利用用户注视、姿态和惯性信号实时推断用户意图，仅保留最关键的感知数据。实验表明，该方法在保持高性能的同时显著降低了能耗，为实现节能的意图驱动型人机交互提供了可行方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有增强现实眼镜因持续捕捉高分辨率视频而导致功耗和内存瓶颈。本文提出EPIC框架，通过算法-硬件协同优化，利用用户注视、姿态和惯性信号实时推断用户意图，仅保留最关键的感知数据。实验表明，该方法在保持高性能的同时显著降低了能耗，为实现节能的意图驱动型人机交互提供了可行方案。

deep_dive.title: An Augmented Reality Brain-Robot Interface for Generalist Robot Arm Manipulation
deep_dive.abstract: The integration of augmented reality (AR) and EEG-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) offers a promising path for enabling intuitive control of robots for assistive purposes. However, existing AR brain-robot interface (BRI) systems are often constrained to task-specific structures, limiting their utility in real-world environments. We present an AR BRI designed for generalist robot arm manipulation that combines gaze-based object selection with motor imagery action control. Our system uses eye-tracking for intuitive object targeting and context-aware visual overlays ("Place" and "Use") to guide the user through tasks within a shared autonomy framework. We evaluated the interface through a feasibility study with 18 healthy participants performing three multi-step activities of daily living: drinking, using a drawer, and operating an oven. Our results demonstrate that this interaction paradigm enables effective sequential task execution and high user engagement, achieving a "Good" usability rating (SUS > 70). These findings support the feasibility of the proposed interaction paradigm for complex BCI-driven robotic assistance, and motivate future evaluation with the intended target population. Project website: https://ar-bri-manip.github.io/.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: gaze-based object selection in AR BRI
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 增强现实中的基于注视的对象选择
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 增强现实中的基于注视的对象选择
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 增强现实中的基于注视的对象选择
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: An AR brain-robot interface uses gaze-based object selection and motor imagery for generalist robot arm manipulation, evaluated with 18 participants.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一种增强现实脑机接口系统，结合基于注视的对象选择与运动想象动作控制，实现通用机器人臂操控。系统在共享自主框架下通过眼动追踪实现直观目标选择，并通过18名健康被试的可行性研究验证了效果。该工作为基于注视的人机交互提供了新的范式，有助于推动实时意图识别在辅助机器人中的应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一种增强现实脑机接口系统，结合基于注视的对象选择与运动想象动作控制，实现通用机器人臂操控。系统在共享自主框架下通过眼动追踪实现直观目标选择，并通过18名健康被试的可行性研究验证了效果。该工作为基于注视的人机交互提供了新的范式，有助于推动实时意图识别在辅助机器人中的应用。

quick_skim.title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
quick_skim.abstract: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. A fire starts on a security monitor, an expression flickers across a video call, or a product a viewer wants flashes by in a livestream. Yet today's large models remain mostly turn-based by design: they answer only when addressed, and even video-call apps that appear interactive still operate as question-answer systems, reacting only when polled or prompted. We argue for a different paradigm: a model that is present in the world like a person. It continuously watches what is happening now, decides on its own whether to speak or stay silent, interacts in real time, and delegates to a background model when the problem is hard. To advance interaction models and their adoption across domains, we make two fully open-sourced contributions. First, we release JoyAI-VL-Interaction, an 8B-scale, vision-first VL-interaction model. The model makes the response decision internally, choosing each second to stay silent, respond, or delegate to a background model, and it excels at vision-triggered responsiveness and time awareness. We pair it with a transferable training recipe, from which capabilities we never trained for emerge, such as guiding a shopper through changing app screens or improvising a lecture from a slide deck. Second, we release a complete, deployable system built around that model. The system streams any ongoing video into the model, making it genuinely present in the world. All other components are pluggable, including ASR/TTS modules, memory, visualization UI, and a background brain that can connect to any API or agent. Across six real-world scenarios, human raters prefer JoyAI-VL-Interaction over the in-app video-call assistants of Doubao and Gemini by a wide margin. To our knowledge, this is the first open, vision-driven interaction model released together with its training recipe, data, and complete deployable system.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: proactive real-time interaction paradigm for proactive system response
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前瞻性实时交互范式，用于主动系统响应
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前瞻性实时交互范式，用于主动系统响应
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前瞻性实时交互范式，用于主动系统响应
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an always-on model that continuously observes and proactively decides when to speak, enabling real-time interaction without user prompts, aligning with proactive interaction paradigms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 当前大模型多为轮询式设计，只能被动响应。本文提出一种持续观察环境并自主决定是否交互的实时模型，实现无需用户提示的主动交互，符合前瞻性交互范式的需求。该方法通过实时流处理和延迟决策机制，在安全监控、视频通话等场景中展示其潜力，为人机交互提供了新的设计思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 当前大模型多为轮询式设计，只能被动响应。本文提出一种持续观察环境并自主决定是否交互的实时模型，实现无需用户提示的主动交互，符合前瞻性交互范式的需求。该方法通过实时流处理和延迟决策机制，在安全监控、视频通话等场景中展示其潜力，为人机交互提供了新的设计思路。
